description_long: This house features a modern, open-plan layout with extensive use of glass walls, allowing for abundant natural light and clear views between rooms. The structure is primarily rectangular with a large, open living area, several smaller rooms, and a spacious, likely multi-purpose room on one side. The interior includes visible furnishings such as tables, chairs, and shelving, with a mix of private and communal spaces. The exterior is dominated by large, grid-patterned windows, giving the house a contemporary, industrial feel. The roof is flat, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and functional spaces. The color palette is neutral, with white and gray tones accented by some wood and dark surfaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large grid-patterned glass windows, open-plan interiors, and a neutral color palette. The design emphasizes natural light, clean lines, and functional living spaces.
description_view_0: This view highlights the large, open room on the left and the extensive glass wall along the front, with interior partitions and visible furnishings.
description_view_1: The front facade is fully visible, showcasing the grid-patterned glass windows and the main entry area, with a clear view into multiple rooms and communal spaces.
description_view_2: This angle reveals the back and side of the house, including a prominent wooden feature wall and more private interior spaces.
description_view_3: The rear of the house is shown, with the large open room and additional glass walls, as well as a glimpse into the kitchen and dining areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: large grid-patterned windows spanning the facade
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a glass door integrated into the window grid, no visible porch or steps, minimalist and flush with the facade
